mundo.titulo: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
mundo.resumen: X owner Musk has posted several times on the site criticising the police treatment of Henry Nowak.

mundo.titulo: Inquest to examine if police response contributed to Henry Nowak death
mundo.resumen: A full inquest into Henry Nowak's death is scheduled for September 2027 in Winchester.

mundo.titulo: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
mundo.resumen: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.

mundo.titulo: Oscar-nominated Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies aged 56
mundo.resumen: The French-Iranian author and illustrator was known for her graphic novel series and Oscar-nominated film.

mundo.titulo: 'Nothing left to chance' for Bayeux Tapestry's journey to London
mundo.resumen: The 950-year-old work will be as safe "as a baby" during its move to London, French officials say.

mundo.titulo: Harry and Meghan celebrate Lilibet's fifth birthday
mundo.resumen: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex share a picture of their daughter Lilibet, calling her "our dream girl".

negocios.titulo: SpaceX says it's worth $1.75tn as it targets largest stock market debut
negocios.resumen: Elon Musk’s space exploration company set a target share price for buyers earlier than expected.

negocios.titulo: 'I lost thousands in savings and my partner's money is in limbo'
negocios.resumen: The number of people withdrawing money from a LISA is outpacing the number using one to buy a home. Why?

negocios.titulo: Three-quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
negocios.resumen: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

negocios.titulo: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
negocios.resumen: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.

negocios.titulo: Universal park officially named as government pledges £1.3bn
negocios.resumen: The government's contribution is going towards upgrading local infrastructure and transport links.

negocios.titulo: 'By the grace of God': Miners dig on as lab-grown diamonds change market
negocios.resumen: The rising popularity of lab-grown diamonds heaps pressure on those hunting for the natural gems.

tecnologia.titulo: Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better
tecnologia.resumen: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.

tecnologia.titulo: Benchmark raises its first-ever growth fund as part of $2B capital raise
tecnologia.resumen: The legendary abandons its more than 20 year tradition of keeping its funds to about $425 million.

tecnologia.titulo: Quick commerce FirstClub doubles valuation to $255M in nine months
tecnologia.resumen: The Bengaluru startup has crossed 1 million orders and reached a $50 million annualized GMV run rate within a year of launch.

tecnologia.titulo: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
tecnologia.resumen: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

tecnologia.titulo: Defense tech is flooded with money, but who’s built to last?
tecnologia.resumen: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. tecnologia.titulo: Uber to put 500 data-collection vehicles on the road this year
tecnologia.resumen: The modified Ioniq 5 will be loaded with sensors to capture data for Uber's new AV Labs division.

tecnologia.titulo: Let us filter AI slop, you cowards
tecnologia.resumen: It's almost impossible to avoid seeing AI-generated content online, but it doesn't have to be this way. YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more have ramped up content authentication efforts over the last year, with many now automatically applying labels to distinguish AI-generated images, videos, and music from those made by real, human creators. tecnologia.titulo: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
tecnologia.resumen: Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons. In an open letter to US lawmakers, tech leaders are pressing Congress to enact rules closing what they say is an alarming biosecurity gap […]

tecnologia.titulo: This Google Photos update has saved your digital photo frame
tecnologia.resumen: Aura's digital photo frames will continue to automatically sync with your Google Photos albums, after API changes threatened to remove the feature. Aura is now rolling out a full migration to Google's new Ambient API, allowing your Aura frame slideshows to be automatically updated with new photos, instead of requiring owners to manually add them […]

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon develops a warehouse robot that workers can speak to
tecnologia.resumen: Amazon has announced a new version of its fully autonomous warehouse robot, Proteus, that will interact using language instead of code. The expanded capabilities come as part of a growing pivot toward automation as the e-commerce giant replaces its human workers with robots. Amazon says the AI-powered upgrade means its human employees can assign the […]

tecnologia.titulo: Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design
tecnologia.resumen: Shokz has announced two new versions of its open earbuds. Like the original OpenDots One that launched in May 2025, the new Shokz OpenDots 2 and OpenDots Air are both designed to be worn clipped to the back of your ear with their drivers positioned to project sound toward your ear canals without blocking them.
